name: Abdulkadir Shaikh
bio: Second-year student and Founder of Civveo, specializing in scalable Flutter and MERN stack development. When I’m not architecting hyperlocal solutions, I’m either drafting my debut novel (currently 24,000+ words in) or pushing my limits on the keyboard—chasing a 150 WPM typing goal. I believe in the power of words, whether they are written in Dart, JavaScript, or prose.
